name: Ciskei (1981–1994)

colors.symbolism: the chevron — life-blood of the people

description: A white field with a red chevron pointing from hoist to fly, charged with the Ciskeian coat of arms in the centre.
history: Flag of Ciskei, one of the four nominally independent 'Bantustans' created by apartheid-era South Africa as a 'homeland' for the Xhosa-speaking people of the Ciskei region. Independence declared 4 December 1981, internationally unrecognised. Reincorporated into South Africa in 1994.
